title: UG & PG Programs Offered

detail.title: UG & PG Programs Offered
detail.short_info: DG Vaishnav College Application Form 2026-27 is open for UG & PG courses. Counselling for Aided UG on 13 May & 18 May 2026. Check eligibility, fees, and apply online now.

content.text: DG Vaishnav College Application Form 2026-27 is now open for UG (Aided & Unaided) and PG courses. Candidates can apply online for admissions at D.G. Vaishnav College (Dwaraka Doss Goverdhan Doss Vaishnav College), Chennai, for the 2026-27 academic session.
Direct Apply Link for DG Vaishnav College Application Form UG: Click Here
Direct Apply Link for DG Vaishnav College Application Form PG: Click Here

sections.heading: Overview of DG Vaishnav College (DDGDVC) Admissions 2026-27

rows: UG Aided, UG Unaided, PG Shift-I & Shift-II

content.text: UG Aided (Day Shift): B.A. Economics (DU01), B.Com Corporate Secretaryship (DU02), B.Sc. Mathematics (MAN - DU03 & MPC - DU04), B.Sc. Physics (DU05), B.Sc. Chemistry (DU06), B.Sc. Plant Biology & Plant Biotechnology (DU07), B.Com General (DU08).

UG Unaided (Evening Shift): 28+ courses including B.A. Economics, Tamil, English, Journalism, Sociology; Multiple B.Com programmes (General, Honours with CMA, Bank Management, etc.); B.Sc. Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Computer Science, Visual Communication, Data Science, Criminology, AI, etc.; B.C.A., B.B.A. and more.

PG Shift I & II: M.A. Economics, HRM, Journalism & Communication, English; MSW; M.Com; M.B.A.; M.C.A.; M.Sc. in Mathematics, Chemistry, Physics, Microbiology, Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Computer Science, IT, Data Science and others.
SC/ST candidates are eligible for fee concessions.

sections.heading: Important Dates for DG Vaishnav College Admissions 2026-27

content.text: UG Aided (Day Stream) Counselling Schedule

rows: B.Sc. Mathematics (MAN & MPC), Physics, Chemistry, Plant Biology & Plant Biotechnology

content.text: Note: Reservation, total seats available, and cut-off marks will be updated after the publication of +2 results. Number of candidates called for counselling is in the ratio of 1:5. Venue: SRG Auditorium.
Eligibility depends on subjects studied in +2/Higher Secondary:
Aided Stream (Key Requirements):

items: B.Sc. Mathematics / Physics / Chemistry: Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics.
B.Sc. Plant Biology & Biotechnology: Botany, Zoology / Biology.
B.Com Programmes: Commerce & Accountancy with specific subjects.

content.text: Unaided Stream (Key Requirements):

items: B.Com (Honours) EU15: Commerce, Accountancy, Economics with Maths/Business Maths (Minimum 75% aggregate).
B.Sc. Computer Science / Data Science / AI: Science Stream with Mathematics.
B.C.A.: Mathematics / Business Mathematics / Computer Science.
Most Arts & other Commerce courses: Any stream or Commerce background.

content.text: Full detailed eligibility is available in the official prospectus/PDF.

sections.heading: How to Apply Online for DG Vaishnav College Application Form 2026-27

items: Visit the respective UG or PG application portal.
Enter 10th Std Registration Number, Date of Birth & Verification Code → Click “I Agree”.
Fill Personal Details, Basic Information, Address, Parent/Guardian Details & Academic Records.
Enter +2 subject-wise marks.
Upload passport-size photograph (3.5 cm × 4.5 cm, white background, 10-50 KB, no selfie).
Pay application fee online (Credit Card, Net Banking, UPI, QR Code).
Submit and download the filled application form & acknowledgement.

content.text: Apply Online links are provided above.

items: Filled Counselling Form
Transfer Certificate (Original + 6 photocopies) – Compulsory
+2 Provisional Mark Sheet (6 photocopies)
Online Community Certificate (Original + 6 photocopies) – Compulsory
Migration Certificate (if applicable)
3 Passport Size Photographs
Other relevant certificates

content.text: Admissions are merit-based through counselling as per Tamil Nadu Government reservation policy. Candidates must attend counselling in formal dress. Latecomers are not allowed.
